name: Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton
address: 4455 Paradise Rd, Đông The Strip, Las Vegas (NV), Hoa Kỳ
description:
Khám Phá Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton - Nơi Hội Tụ Của Sang Trọng và Tiện Nghi Tại Las Vegas

Nằm giữa trung tâm sôi động của Las Vegas, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton đã trở thành điểm đến lý tưởng cho những du khách tìm kiếm sự pha trộn hoàn hảo giữa phong cách hiện đại và dịch vụ đẳng cấp. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 1995 và mới được nâng cấp toàn diện vào năm 2020, mang đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng mới mẻ, sang trọng và đầy tiện nghi. Với thời gian check-in bắt đầu từ 15:00 và check-out trước 11:00 sáng, du khách có thể dễ dàng sắp xếp lịch trình để khám phá thành phố giải trí nổi tiếng này.

Virgin Hotels còn nổi bật với chính sách thân thiện với gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 1 đến 17 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng cho các gia đình du lịch cùng nhau. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn chấp nhận tối đa 2 thú cưng mỗi phòng, phù hợp với những du khách yêu thích mang theo thú cưng của mình. Với tổng số phòng đa dạng và tiện nghi, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo cho mọi khách hàng.

Trải Nghiệm Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas

Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, du khách không chỉ được tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng mà còn có cơ hội trải nghiệm các tiện ích giải trí đa dạng và phong phú. Casino hiện đại và sôi động mang đến những phút giây hồi hộp và hấp dẫn, nơi bạn có thể thử vận may của mình trong không khí náo nhiệt. Sau những phút giây chơi game, hãy thư giãn tại các quầy bar sôi động, nơi phục vụ các loại đồ uống đa dạng, từ cocktail sáng tạo đến các loại rượu thượng hạng, phù hợp cho mọi sở thích. Đặc biệt, khu vực spa và hot tub mang lại cảm giác thư thái, giúp bạn xua tan mệt mỏi và tận hưởng những phút giây nghỉ ngơi tuyệt vời trong không gian yên bình và sang trọng.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas

Virgin Hotels Las Vegas tự hào mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm thể thao và giải trí đỉnh cao với trung tâm thể hình hiện đại, được trang bị đầy đủ thiết bị tiên tiến để bạn duy trì phong độ thể chất trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Dù bạn là người yêu thích tập luyện hàng ngày hay chỉ muốn duy trì hoạt động nhẹ nhàng, trung tâm thể hình của khách sạn sẽ đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của bạn một cách tối ưu. Ngoài ra, sau những giờ phút tập luyện, bạn có thể thư giãn tuyệt đối tại hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn, nơi lý tưởng để ngắm nhìn khung cảnh thành phố Las Vegas sôi động và tận hưởng không khí trong lành, mát mẻ.

Tiện Nghi Hiện Đại Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Virgin Hotels Las Vegas mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm tiện nghi vượt trội với dịch vụ phòng 24/7, giúp bạn dễ dàng thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích ngay tại phòng mình. Đội ngũ concierge chuyên nghiệp luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ mọi nhu cầu của khách, từ đặt vé đến hướng dẫn tham quan thành phố. Đặc biệt, khách sẽ được tận hưởng kết nối internet tốc độ cao miễn phí tại tất cả các phòng và khu vực công cộng, giúp bạn dễ dàng liên lạc và cập nhật thông tin mọi lúc mọi nơi.

Ngoài ra, khách lưu trú còn có thể yên tâm về việc lưu giữ hành lý an toàn khi cần thiết, cùng với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo không gian luôn sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Với những tiện ích hiện đại này, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas cam kết mang lại cho bạn một kỳ nghỉ tiện nghi, thoải mái và trọn vẹn tại thành phố không ngủ này.

Tiện Nghi Về Giao Thông Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton tự hào mang đến dịch vụ đỗ xe tiện lợi và linh hoạt cho khách hàng với hệ thống valet parking chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và dễ dàng tiếp cận khách sạn. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ gửi xe tại bãi đỗ xe ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn, đảm bảo an toàn và thuận tiện cho hành trình của mình. Đặc biệt, khách lưu trú còn được miễn phí bãi đỗ xe, giúp tiết kiệm chi phí và mang lại trải nghiệm thoải mái, không lo lắng về vấn đề đỗ xe trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Đẳng Cấp Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas

Không gian phòng còn được trang bị các rèm chắn sáng blackout curtains, giúp bạn dễ dàng điều chỉnh ánh sáng để có giấc ngủ ngon. Ngoài ra, minibar đầy đủ các loại đồ uống và đồ ăn nhẹ sẽ làm hài lòng những khách hàng yêu thích sự tiện lợi ngay trong phòng. Các tiện nghi này không chỉ mang lại sự tiện ích mà còn thể hiện đẳng cấp và phong cách sang trọng của khách sạn, giúp bạn có những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời và thoải mái nhất khi lưu trú tại Las Vegas.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Không chỉ có nhà hàng và dịch vụ phòng, Virgin Hotels còn chú trọng đến sự sạch sẽ và thoải mái của khách thông qua dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày. Đội ngũ nhân viên tận tâm luôn đảm bảo căn phòng của bạn luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, giúp bạn cảm thấy thư thái và dễ chịu suốt kỳ nghỉ. Tất cả những tiện ích này đều hướng đến việc mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo, kết hợp giữa ẩm thực ngon miệng và dịch vụ chăm sóc khách hàng chu đáo.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng để phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Bạn có thể chọn phòng Resort 1 King Chamber với giường King rộng rãi, hoặc các phòng như Resort 2 Queens Chamber với hai giường Queen thoải mái để gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn. Ngoài ra, còn có các phòng cao cấp như Ruby 2 Queens Grand Chamber Suite hay Canyon 1 King Deluxe Grand Chamber Suite, mang lại trải nghiệm sang trọng và riêng tư cho khách lưu trú.

Đặt phòng qua Agoda không những giúp bạn sở hữu mức giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà. Với hệ thống đặt phòng trực tuyến tiện lợi, bạn có thể dễ dàng lựa chọn loại phòng phù hợp, so sánh giá cả và xác nhận đặt phòng một cách an toàn và thuận tiện, giúp chuyến đi của bạn trở nên trọn vẹn hơn.

Khám phá Đông The Strip - Trung tâm sôi động của Las Vegas

Đông The Strip là một khu vực nổi tiếng tại Las Vegas, Hoa Kỳ, nằm giữa Khu đô thị Las Vegas và Khu đô thị Paradise. Với vị trí tuyệt vời này, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp và sự phấn khích của thành phố này.

Với hàng loạt các khách sạn, casino, nhà hàng, và các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng, Đông The Strip là trung tâm sôi động của Las Vegas. Du khách có thể thử vận may tại các sòng bạc hoặc thưởng thức những trò chơi giải trí độc đáo. Ngoài ra, khu vực này còn có nhiều nhà hàng, quán bar, và cửa hàng mua sắm đẳng cấp, đáp ứng nhu cầu của mọi du khách.

Ngoài ra, Đông The Strip cũng gần các địa điểm nổi tiếng khác của Las Vegas như Khu nghỉ dưỡng Caesars Palace, Khu phố Fremont, và Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wynn Las Vegas. Du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển và khám phá những điểm đến này từ Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton. Với mọi tiện ích và vị trí tuyệt vời, khách sạn này là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho kỳ nghỉ tại Las Vegas.

Cách đến Virgin Hotels Las Vegas từ sân bay gần nhất

Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton nằm ở Đông The Strip, Las Vegas (NV), Hoa Kỳ. Để đến đây từ sân bay gần nhất, bạn có một số lựa chọn tiện lợi và thuận tiện.

Sân bay quốc tế McCarran là sân bay gần nhất với Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, cách khoảng 4,5 dặm (khoảng 7,2 km). Bạn có thể đi taxi hoặc sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón từ sân bay để đến khách sạn. Đi taxi từ sân bay McCarran sẽ mất khoảng 15 phút và có giá cước khoảng 20-25 đô la Mỹ.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt công cộng để đến Virgin Hotels Las Vegas. Từ sân bay McCarran, bạn có thể đi bộ đến trạm xe buýt gần nhất và chọn tuyến xe 109 hoặc 108 để đến khu vực Đông The Strip. Thời gian di chuyển bằng xe buýt khoảng 30-40 phút và giá vé rất hợp lý.

Dù bạn chọn phương tiện giao thông nào, hãy chắc chắn kiểm tra lịch trình và giá vé trước khi đi để có một chuyến đi thuận tiện và dễ dàng đến Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng xung quanh Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Nằm tại vị trí thuận lợi, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một điểm xuất phát tuyệt vời để khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng xung quanh. Khách sạn nằm gần Khu hội nghị nổi tiếng Pinball, nơi bạn có thể thỏa sức tham gia vào các trò chơi pinball độc đáo và hấp dẫn. Bên cạnh đó, Bảo tàng thí nghiệm nguyên tử cũng nằm trong tầm tay, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm học thuật thú vị về nguyên tử và hạt nhân.

Nếu bạn muốn tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa địa phương, hãy ghé thăm Bảo tàng Marjorie Barrick, nơi trưng bày những tác phẩm nghệ thuật và hiện vật quý giá của vùng đất này. Đối với những ai yêu thích golf, Greens of Las Vegas là một sân golf tuyệt vời để thử thách kỹ năng của mình. Ngoài ra, còn có các điểm đến khác như UNLV, The Liberace Mansion, Cửa hàng súng, Commercial Center, LMC Laboratories và Buffalo sẽ mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm thú vị và đa dạng trong chuyến du lịch của bạn.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Khi lưu trú tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton, du khách sẽ có rất nhiều sự lựa chọn về những nhà hàng xung quanh. Các tùy chọn bao gồm To Drami, một nhà hàng tại Glyfada - Voula, nổi tiếng với các món ăn ngon và không gian sang trọng. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Mexico, Lindo Michoacan là lựa chọn hoàn hảo với các món ăn truyền thống và không gian ấm cúng. Gorilla Sushi là địa điểm lý tưởng để thưởng thức sushi tươi ngon và sashimi độc đáo. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức burger thì hãy đến Bar Code Burgers, nơi có những món burger thơm ngon và phong cách hiện đại. Panchos Vegan Restaurant & Cantina là địa điểm lý tưởng cho những người ăn chay với các món ăn chay sáng tạo và hương vị tuyệt vời. Cuba Cafe Restaurant mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm ẩm thực Cuba đích thực với các món ăn đa dạng và hấp dẫn. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Thái Lan, hãy đến Lotus of Siam - Flamingo Road, nơi có các món ăn Thái ngon và độc đáo. Ely's Breakfast Restaurant & Burgers là địa điểm lý tưởng để thưởng thức bữa sáng và burger truyền thống. Mint Indian Bistro là địa điểm hoàn hảo cho những người yêu thích ẩm thực Ấn Độ với các món ăn đa dạng và hương vị tuyệt vời. Cuối cùng, Los Olivos Ristorante mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm ẩm thực Ý đích thực với các món ăn truyền thống và không gian ấm cúng.

Trung tâm mua sắm xung quanh Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Nằm trong khu vực gần Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton, du khách có thể tìm thấy nhiều trung tâm mua sắm phong cách và độc đáo. The Rack là một cửa hàng thời trang nổi tiếng với các mẫu áo quần hàng đầu. Boulevard Mall, một trung tâm mua sắm lớn, cung cấp một loạt các cửa hàng và nhà hàng đa dạng. Hall of Antiquities là nơi bạn có thể khám phá những hiện vật cổ xưa độc đáo. Nếu bạn là một người yêu truyện tranh, hãy ghé qua Alternate Reality Comics hoặc Cosmic Comics để khám phá thế giới truyện tranh đa dạng. Buffalo Exchange và Bad Attitude Boutique The Corset Store là những địa điểm lý tưởng để tìm kiếm những món đồ thời trang độc đáo. Nếu bạn là một người đam mê nghệ thuật, hãy ghé qua Donna Beam Fine Art Gallery để thưởng thức những tác phẩm nghệ thuật độc đáo. Cuối cùng, The Basement là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá các cửa hàng thời trang, giày dép và phụ kiện hàng đầu.

Giá trung bình một phòng tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Với giá trung bình chỉ 225 đô la một đêm, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm không gian sang trọng và tiện nghi tại Las Vegas (NV). So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại thành phố này là 220 đô la, giá phòng tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas khá hợp lý và cạnh tranh.

Khách sạn này không chỉ nổi bật với kiến trúc đẹp mắt và trang thiết bị hiện đại, mà còn mang đến một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ với dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và tiện ích tuyệt vời. Với giá trung bình như vậy, du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian sống rộng rãi, phòng ngủ thoải mái và vị trí thuận lợi để khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng của Las Vegas.

Với sự kết hợp giữa giá cả hợp lý và tiện nghi đẳng cấp, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm không gian sang trọng và đẳng cấp tại Las Vegas mà không cần phải chi trả quá nhiều.

Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một khách sạn đáng ngạc nhiên với dịch vụ khách hàng tuyệt vời. Phòng ở đây rất đẹp và sáng tạo, với một chiếc sofa đặt giữa hai giường. Phòng rất hiện đại và phong cách. Tôi thực sự thích những căn phòng ở đây, chúng rất phong cách, sạch sẽ và giường rất thoải mái. Đây là một trong những trải nghiệm tốt nhất của chúng tôi tại khách sạn. Nhân viên rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Khách sạn này cung cấp một giá cả hợp lý nhưng chất lượng tuyệt vời. Nó có thiết kế độc đáo và giá cả phải chăng. Tôi rất thích nội thất của khách sạn này. Với những điều này, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton thực sự là một khách sạn tuyệt vời.

Sự đánh giá tích cực về Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton

Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton đã nhận được sự đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.4 trên 10. Khách hàng đặc biệt ấn tượng với sự hợp lý về giá trị của khách sạn, với điểm đánh giá lên tới 8.7. Khách sạn cung cấp các tiện nghi tuyệt vời, được đánh giá 8.6, đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng một cách tuyệt vời. 

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao sự sạch sẽ của Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, với điểm đánh giá lên tới 9.0. Khách sạn luôn duy trì môi trường sạch sẽ và tiêu chuẩn vệ sinh cao, mang lại cảm giác thoải mái và an lành cho khách hàng. 

Vị trí của khách sạn cũng được khách hàng đánh giá khá cao với điểm 8.1. Với vị trí thuận lợi tại Las Vegas, khách sạn nằm gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng và các khu mua sắm, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho khách hàng khám phá thành phố. 

Khách hàng cũng nhận xét tích cực về đội ngũ nhân viên của khách sạn, với điểm đánh giá lên tới 8.5. Nhân viên tận tâm và thân thiện, luôn sẵn sàng để hỗ trợ và đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. 

Với những đánh giá tích cực như vậy, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Las Vegas.

sample_comments.text:
Cuối năm, tôi đã ở lại một ngày. 
Đầu tiên, sự phục vụ của nhân viên lễ tân rất tốt. Một phụ nữ có tóc màu hồng rất hợp với cô ấy đã giải thích rất cẩn thận cho chúng tôi, những người không biết tiếng Anh. 
Ngoài ra, chúng tôi còn được nâng cấp phòng, và đây là trải nghiệm lưu trú tuyệt vời nhất trong chuyến đi 7 đêm tại Mỹ vào cuối năm. 
Về vị trí, khách sạn không quá gần cũng không quá xa trung tâm, nếu bạn thích đi dạo, bạn hoàn toàn có thể đi bộ vào trung tâm. 
Tôi đã đi bộ bên ngoài vào giữa đêm mà không cảm thấy nguy hiểm. 
Bãi đậu xe cũng miễn phí và ra vào tự do. 

Ngoài ra, phòng rất sạch sẽ, có bồn tắm lớn, điều này thật đáng mừng đối với chúng tôi - những người Nhật Bản. 
Nội thất và màu sắc cũng rất đẹp, tôi đã chụp rất nhiều ảnh. 
Khi làm thủ tục trả phòng, tôi được phục vụ bởi cùng một nhân viên lễ tân, nhưng do không thể nói tiếng Anh, tôi không thể truyền đạt cảm xúc vui mừng (thực ra tôi muốn nói cảm ơn ngay tại chỗ..), tôi thường ít khi viết đánh giá, nhưng bây giờ tôi muốn đăng bài này. 
Cảm ơn rất nhiều!! Khi tôi quay lại Las Vegas, tôi sẽ sử dụng dịch vụ của bạn.
sample_comments.title: Đây là một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời nhất!
sample_comments.response: We appreciate you taking the time to share such a thoughtful review. It is wonderful to hear how much you enjoyed your stay and that our front desk team member made such a memorable impression during both check-in and checkout. Your kind words about the room, the décor, and the comfort of the large bathtub mean a great deal, and we are pleased to know the upgrade added to your experience. It is also great to hear that the parking and the surrounding area worked well for your visit. Thank you again for sharing your experience. We look forward to welcoming you back on your next trip to Las Vegas.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: nice room

sample_comments.text: Đây là một chỗ ở thoải mái với giá cả hợp lý. Mặc dù tôi được cho phòng ở tận cuối hành lang nên phải đi bộ một quãng đường dài và phòng thì không có cảnh đẹp, chỉ nhìn thấy rác, nhưng trạng thái phòng thì tuyệt vời. Việc bãi đỗ xe miễn phí là rất tốt. Có bãi đỗ xe ở cả hai bên, nhưng người lần đầu đến có thể gặp khó khăn trong việc tìm vị trí và vào bãi đỗ xe gần nhất. Nhân viên an toàn thường hay nhắc nhở trẻ con ở hồ bơi, nên nó có vẻ là một chỗ ở thích hợp cho các cặp đôi. Đi cùng gia đình có vẻ không tốt bằng đi cùng nhau như một cặp. Hồ bơi thì rất tốt.
sample_comments.title: Nơi ở thoải mái
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jung,
Thank you for your review and feedback. We're happy to hear that you found the accommodation comfortable and appreciated the quality of the room and the convenience of our free parking. We also understand your concerns about the location of your room and the pool experience, and we'll definitely look into how we can improve signage and better guide first-time visitors to our parking areas. We are sorry the view didn't meet your expectations and that the pool rules made it feel less family-friendly. While we do have guidelines in place to ensure safety for all, we understand the importance of creating a welcoming environment for guests of all ages, and we'll continue to review this balance. We truly value your insights and hope to welcome you back soon.

sample_comments.title: Bedroom was comfy and the view was so beautiful because I was facing the sphere, mountains, and airport. Security was gr
sample_comments.positives: Full secured because security was everywhere in the building. Pet friendly. A lot of restaurants and fast food inside the property. Also, fun activity and outside the property a lot of food as well you can check it out through walking distance.
sample_comments.negatives: Front desk wasn't smile and slow to check-in. I wish there is kiosk and easy to check-in and out. Also, front desk didn't tell me where to park easily go to my room from hotel registration to Opal Tower. I was glad the lady security was in charge by high limit room helped me where should I go to opal tower that I parked in Harmon Parking Garage. Bedsheet wasn't clean, hair dryer was broken and one of the wall plug didn't work.

sample_comments.text:
Ngoại trừ việc cách xa trung tâm, tất cả đều hoàn hảo! Nếu sử dụng xe cho thuê thì 100 điểm.

Giá thuê phòng rẻ, phí đậu xe miễn phí, hồ bơi nước ấm, rộng rãi và thoải mái.

Nếu có cơ hội tiếp theo đến Las Vegas, tôi nhất định sẽ quay lại đây, nhất định cần thuê xe.
sample_comments.title: Giá cả hợp lý tuyệt vời.
descent - not on strip
sample_comments.positives: room location was far from the entrance - stayed in the Opal tower.
sample_comments.negatives: how far to to get to the room

sample_comments.text: Các phòng rộng rãi, sạch sẽ và được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cần thiết cho một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái. Nước nóng luôn sẵn có, và các phương tiện giao thông cũng thuận tiện. Nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo, nâng cao trải nghiệm tổng thể. Địa điểm tốt, mặc dù không hoàn hảo, nhưng giá trị cho đồng tiền đã làm cho đây trở thành một lựa chọn mạnh mẽ cho chỗ ở.
sample_comments.title: Giá trị tuyệt vời so với giá tiền
sample_comments.response:
Dear Corteney,
We are happy Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton was a solid accommodation! It's great to hear you enjoyed everything we have to offer, and our team will be happy to hear your generous words. Thank you for staying with us, and we hope you'll come by if you're ever back in Vegas!

sample_comments.title: Constant noise and repeated staff interruptions made it impossible to sleep, leaving us exhausted for our six-hour drive
sample_comments.positives: Easy check-in.
sample_comments.negatives:
Our stay was extremely disappointing. We were assigned a room on the 11th floor, and unfortunately, we barely got any sleep due to constant noise from the elevator brakes throughout the night. It was loud enough to keep both my husband and me awake.

The following morning only made things worse. Despite being told at check-in that checkout was at noon, the cleaning staff repeatedly attempted to enter our room early, which woke us up again. There was no functioning "Do Not Disturb" sign available, which is something I've never experienced at any hotel before. I even tried to signal that we were still inside, but it didn't work. I ended up having to use the top lock to prevent anyone from coming in.

Overall, we left feeling exhausted and had to drive six hours back home in that condition, which made the experience even more frustrating. This stay did not meet basic expectations for rest and privacy.

sample_comments.title: Worst experience I have ever had
sample_comments.text:
First of all, a room with a broken light system was given to me. I had to request a room change but it was fully book that day, they claimed. 

Second of all, the new room I got assigned to was a downgraded room with smaller space, facing another room and no bathtub while my original room was obviously larger and facing the city of Las Vegas. 

If you encounter this room change, you will probably expect some sort of refunds right? But NO! THEY DON"T CARE. NO REFUNDS, NO FOOD AND BEVERAGE VOUCHER, NO ANYTHING. And I even have to move my luggage myself after a day with exhausting body and soul at near mid-night.

I highly DON"T recommend Virgin Hotel if you are planning to visit Las Vegas. It will only bring you horrible travel experience.

My pet was no causing any damage or disturbing. But they say I was breaking their policies by having a cat . And I had to check out immediately. Very disturbing situation an horrible management. Why did they let me check in in first place when they saw my cat getting in with me ?

sample_comments.title: Filthy
sample_comments.positives: Parking was free
sample_comments.negatives:
Here's your updated review incorporating that detail:

I recently booked a two-night stay at the Virgin Hotel, but I had to check out at 6 AM on the first day due to completely unacceptable room conditions. The room was filthy---dog hair covered the couch and other areas, there were stains on the walls, and I even found a used water bottle under the bed. The air quality was so bad that I couldn't breathe properly or get any sleep.

When I requested a room change, the hotel informed me they were fully booked and couldn't move me until later. Staying another night was not an option, and I wasn't about to wait around in a dirty room for hours hoping for a new one.

To make matters worse, I never even received a receipt via email---just a survey. It's been two weeks, and I still haven't gotten my money back for the night I didn't stay. I reported this to Booking.com a week ago, and I have yet to hear back from either the hotel or Booking.com.

The lack of communication and accountability is beyond frustrating. I do not recommend this hotel, and I'm extremely disappointed in both Virgin Hotel and Booking.com for their poor customer service. If you value cleanliness, responsiveness, and basic hospitality, stay somewhere else.

sample_comments.title: Front Desk Staff
sample_comments.text:
Im not one to complain. But the check in line was really long when we arrived at 12NN. So we left our luggage and checked in at night instead. 

Got there around 1030PM and there were 2 girls Gaby and Monica in the front desk, chatting, giggling , taking their time as we wait in line for a good 30mins! There were only 4 people in front of me. When it was my turn, Monica said she couldnt find my Agoda booking. At that point I said my phone died and if she could search using my name. She said no. I had to find a way to charge my phone and when it did, I went to thr other counter Gaby. She was annoyed that I distubed their chatting. I said can you try to look for my booking? She said why didnt she (Monica) help you? I said she couldnt find it so can you try on your end? Very snarkily she said what makes you think I can if she cant?

Her manager/supervisor told her to go ahead and taught her how to navigate and they were able to find my reservation!

Thank you to the supervisor but the other staff needs training.

- Check in time was 3pm but we did not get 3 out of 5 rooms till after 5pm. When we spoke to reception about the delay they said they will provide $50 credit per room for the inconvenience, however did not explain that this $50 would not be deducted from the total bill/ resorts fees instead it was credit to be used at the hotel facilities. This meant we did not use the total credit. 
- No tea/coffee making items in rooms 
- Minibar and fridge in rooms are motion detected so if an item is even lifted up and placed back down, it is charged to the room, which is quite an inconvenience because then reception will have to remove items from the bill 
- Hidden costs of resort fees of $56 a day

We appreciate your comments and hope to welcome you back for a smoother stay on your next visit to Las Vegas.

sample_comments.title: Safety, cleanliness, privacy and billing failures
sample_comments.positives: Generally unpleasant stay.
sample_comments.negatives:
Stayed 5 nights in total. The room looked fine at first, but issues escalated quickly. The in-room phone barely worked and had no instructions. A personal item went missing (no conclusion reached), and service requests were slow and incomplete.

We later found a fresh piece of blue chewing gum on the floor next to the bed, which raised serious cleanliness and safety concerns. Despite using Do Not Disturb, the room was entered. The next night, we arrive back in the hotel room and we have a water bottle knocked over on the floor with the lid detached-it was not done by us. And when we got into bed, a pillow had a large, cold wet patch with no visible cause, which was extremely unsettling. We filed security report and explained the situation to at least 5 different staff. They told us they would investigate but we haven't heard anything from them until now, weeks later, and we were not allowed to have a copy of the security report we filed. We still don't know what exactly happened. We were anxious for a few nights and not able to sleep well.

We moved rooms late at night in the final night and were promised waived resort fees and a complimentary late checkout. At checkout, we were still charged, including fees that were supposed to be waived---and we were overcharged extra resort fees for a night where the resort fee was prepaid online. Two weeks later, accounting has not responded to our concerns. 

Would not recommend.

sample_comments.title: Could be awesome
sample_comments.text: I was excited to stay here. Valet attendant yelled at me for not pulling up a couple car lengths more (even though it wasn't busy), then creepily told me how the hotel doesn't charge guests for valet, it's all tips, "so if you take care of me I'll take care of you." It was threatening and I feared for my belongings I left inside as he drove my car off without an opening tip. Checked in at 4 pm, went straight down to the pool and it closed at 4 pm. Rooms are spacious, and there are a lot of rooms here. Might try it again as I used to love Virgin airlines.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The view
sample_comments.negatives: The service and cleanliness

sample_comments.title: What a pity
sample_comments.text: Hotel staff are nice, the facility is good. However, the towels are with dirts and makeup. I've sent email to the hotel, sent msg at agoda platform but didn't get any reply.

sample_comments.title: Hotel on strike!
sample_comments.negatives: No notification from booking.com or Virgin Hotel regarding employee strike! Picketers outside property, had bullhorns at night, all night. Short staffed, exceptional long waits for front desk service. Call before staying at this property, would not recommend until hotel strike is over!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: House cleaning was bad, I found shocks under the bed when I check in. The pillow was filled with small hairs. Front desk staff was not helpful in checking in.

sample_comments.title: Unreasonable charges for unclear things
sample_comments.negatives: They took unreasonable charges at the begging. $300 as a deposit is unheard of. Plus $100 that is nonrefundable for who knows what. The desk worker was very rude when we asked what was the money for and if we still need to pay for the amenities they counted the money towards. She said "Obviously yes." So till this day it is a mystery why they charged that money. The room was nice but it's very loud outside and you can hear everything.

sample_comments.title: Average hotel though 4 star
sample_comments.text: Carpark is free , not too far away. Have to remember to close toilet door while bathing. My kids didn't and it triggered the fire alarm, which we find it quite stressful.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Julie,
Thank you for sharing your experience. It's great to hear that our free parking and prime location added to your stay, and we appreciate you mentioning this to your fellow travelers. That said, we understand how the fire alarm being triggered could have been stressful, especially with kids. Your feedback is helpful, and we'll look into ways to better inform guests to avoid such situations. We appreciate your honesty and hope to welcome you back soon.

sample_comments.title: Don't stay here if you have dogs.
sample_comments.positives: The decor of the room and restaurant options in the casino below. Also, front-desk staff were very kind and helpful after two pitbulls tried to attack my small dogs at check-in.
sample_comments.negatives: The pictures for this place really promote it as a 'dog-friendly' hotel. As someone who was only traveling "thru" Vegas instead of "to," I just needed a place to stay that would be a cost effective option with dogs. The only pet-relief area was a dirty patch of astro-turf in the 115 degree heat by the parking garage that required I walk my two dogs through the entire length of the busy casino every time they needed to go out. The parking lot, while free, is also a huge hassle if you have pets, as it is at the opposite end of the hotel to guest check-in and an oven when temps are high. The hotel is advertised as this beautiful and peaceful oasis, going so far as to charge a $45 resort fee. IT'S A CASINO. A loud, smoky, run of the mill casino that you have to walk thru to get to any of the 'resort' amenities like the pool or the spa. My room was nice -- really love the style, but the bathroom felt dirty -- there were hairs in the shower and a few left in the sink. Made me question the rest of the room's cleanliness. It wasn't for me.

sample_comments.title: strike
sample_comments.text: It would have been nice to know that a major strike was going on there. Also, the bothroom (toilet and shower) area were VERY small, you had to back up into the toilet to shut the door to the room, or the shower door, and could not open both at the same time. Other than that, it was fine.

sample_comments.title: $450 a night in a room with no view
sample_comments.negatives:
The check-in at the front desk was very poor experience and the staff was unwelcoming and unhelpful. 
For a room of $450 a night, I was expecting some kind of view instead of a white wall and HVOC units.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Not too family friendly. No fridge/microwave in the room. Pool closes early.

sample_comments.title: Bad service by front desk
sample_comments.text: Service was nil and very sour once the front of desk staff failed to upsell. Requested for high floor but was given the lowest possible floor when occupancy was not even high. Bed type was not guaranteed as well as we booked for a double bed via agoda but was given twin bed.

sample_comments.title: The walkway to the room is very far
sample_comments.text: The walkway to the room is very far.

sample_comments.negatives: The property can't even provide a post stay invoice. And there's a tray / table in the room with the bar - be super careful with that because apparently even if you just moved anything, they charge you.

sample_comments.title: Not the best stay, you're better off being closer to the strip.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is a 5 min drive from the strip or 25 minute walk. They only give you two bottles of water a day and no electric kettle to make your own water. They also charged a daily resort fee of $59, I guess this is for the two bottles of water?! During checkout there was this random resort charge of $198, which I asked them to remove because the staff didn't know what it was either.

sample_comments.title: Nor worth the price

2. Poor cleaning

sample_comments.title: Do Better!
sample_comments.text: Though the staff were nice; the facilities were subpar! Couldn't use luggage cart without a bellboy and pulling heavy luggage on carpet way on the other side of the building is hard! Carpet needs to be shampooed! Pool DJ starts at 9:00am and you can hear him all day from your room. Door between rooms has no outer lining, so you can also hear the people in the next room like they're in your room! sample_comments.title: The hotel is nice and clean with modern interior but we were disappointed with the lost items . We'v
sample_comments.positives: I like the cleanliness, free parking, not too crowded casino.
sample_comments.negatives: There's no refrigerator we can put our drinks in. There was no ice for 4 days. What I didn't like was one our bags(Macy's reusable shopping bag ) with sneakers was missing. We stayed for 5 nights and when I was looking to wear that pair, we can't find it anywhere.

sample_comments.title: Don't recommend it as a place to live
sample_comments.text:
The location is perfectly nice for those who need to get to the airport, even without taking a taxi or driving. The room looks nice with everything included.
However, the key point is, it's super uncomfortable to rest. The showerhead worked badly and the water out of it is thing and small, which made me very cold. The pillow is way too high and soft, which makes me sick. The quilt is thin and hard to pull. I am too cold to fall asleep during the first half of the night and kept having nightmares. The last half of the night I increased the temperature of the air condition and felt too hot as well. It might be the worst sleep I have ever had. Also, it's not so easy to call the front desk when I'm in the room. I haven't tried other facilities, but I had a fever immediately after leaving this place. When I tried to borrow a thermometer from the front desk, they told me there wasn't one. Wow, then why don't you mention that the hotel offered a daily temperature check for each staff? Is that a lie?
For those who want to have a good sleep, please avoid this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable but high "resort fee"
sample_comments.text: If you're booking this for the price, beware that when you arrive you'll be hit with a $56 per night "resort fee." We asked what resort amenities this includes and they said the pool and spa. In January the pool was closed and you have to buy a day pass to enjoy the spa. So yeah. Otherwise it's clean and comfortable. Not an exciting scene and you will need Ubers to get to the strip. (Adding to the cost) So while it is a much better budget option than some of the scary/depressing off-strip properties, it might be worth spending the extra to stay on the strip.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Regina,
Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback. It's great to hear that you found your accommodations clean and comfortable during your stay. While our resort fee information is readily available on our website and across third-party sites, we regret any inconvenience it may have caused. Your comments are valuable, and we will share them with our team to help ensure future guests enjoy a more seamless stay.

sample_comments.title: Very good

Thank you for sharing your feedback; it's wonderful that you enjoyed our comfortable rooms. That being said, we understand how pricing and dining variety can shape a stay, and we appreciate the opportunity to clarify. Our property features 12 dining options, each showcasing distinct culinary styles and flavors to cater to a diverse range of preferences. Pricing reflects the use of high-quality ingredients and the care our chefs take in preparing each dish. We're glad you enjoyed your visit overall and look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay.

sample_comments.title: Dirty bed sheets
sample_comments.text: The bed sheet has hair and spots, it looks so bad

sample_comments.title: Overall it was ok
sample_comments.text:
The hotel location is not walking distance to much around so prepare to spend on rideshares. The hotel has a cool decor and the room was big and spacious. The bathroom is a big space and has barely space to put toiletries. The bathroom needs shelves and more hooks or racks to hang towels. The closet space is very small. I didn't appreciate that there's sensors in the fridge that charge you if you move something. I only know this info because i asked if i could move things in the mini bar to put some things in the fridge and then i was told about the censors. A room should have a fridge that i can use to store things too. 
Front desk at check in was not very welcoming so that needs work. 
I also had an issue at the spa- make sure you register everyone in your room so you get the hotel spa guest pass price. This is also an error on the front desk person at check in because she only registered 1 person to the room. The manager resolved this later on so it worked out. 
The spa is very basic with steam, sauna, jacuzzi and another coed pool with lounge space. The women's lounge area furniture is nice but not cozy enough for spa lounge and the fireplace feature was not working. Also, the jacuzzi area- it needs some attention. Missing mosaic tiles, old grout, it did not look good and the lounge cushions in the coed pool need replacing asap. 
Restaurants are decent- the mexican restaurant seemed to have more traffic than the others and the breakfast restaurant had a decent buffet- very basic with fruits, pastries (toast is not included)eggs, potatoes, bacon, and omelette station. 
The pool area was nice but not enough free sun loungers. 

This hotel needs to offer a shuttle to the strip. 
I don't know if i would stay here again mostly because of the location .
sample_comments.response:
Dear Miriam,
We're glad you enjoyed your time at our pool, our delicious breakfast offerings, and our wonderful rooms while you were here. However, we apologize for any disappointing service or any other concerns you had during your visit. Rest assured, we will take your comments into consideration as we continuously strive to make improvements for the benefit of our great guests. It was a pleasure having you here, and we hope to have another opportunity to go above and beyond for you in the future.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: The location was great, no charge for parking, tons of options for food. The pool was beautiful. The only thing I was disappointed in was the upgrade. I thought the tub was going to be bigger. In the AC seemed to stop cooling as good in the morning we were leaving
sample_comments.response:
Dear Aireal,
Thank you for your review. It's great to hear that our convenient location, complimentary parking, and dining variety enhanced your stay, along with the enjoyment of our pool area. Your concerns about your tub size and the air conditioning performance are appreciated and will be taken into consideration as part of ongoing efforts to improve guest comfort and satisfaction. We hope to welcome you back for a seamless experience on your next visit.

sample_comments.title: Loud
sample_comments.text:
There is concert every Saturday in the lawn and most reina face this área, so it's loud. 
Also the 3 pools close esa toy at 6:30pm. Overpriced food but that seems to be the norm in Las Vegas nowadays . For go the dunkin in there because it's twice expensive to the Dukin across the street

sample_comments.title: Not health friendly
sample_comments.text: Ruby towers are great because they have their own registration and parking lot, fast elevators. The room is beautiful with a deep bathtub! What is hate is they try to get as much money out of you as possible by a refrigerator that's full of drinks, a tray on the counter with snacks, they all set to charge you if anything is removed from their spot! Gives me unnecessary anxiety when I'm here to relax, no coffee maker or anything to heat tea! The fact that a new hotel need to try to corner you for more money instead of a relax-free environment are deplorable! And the worse part are the restaurants! UNHEALTHY foods! Mostly fried! If that's not your poison let's try scoops of sugar on meat the orange chicken might as well be a cake! All the salt was like eating a pretzel all day everyday! Seniors with health issues might as well consider fasting if they want to live past checkout! I'm 70 and with the price they charge for rooms in want freedom of choice, not force to a slow demise from forcing me to eat, drink what they only have by no refrigeration, no heating of foods and UNHEALTHY restaurants! But a great place if you're fasting or 20 years old, but unfortunately most 20 years old people couldn't afford the room. to sum it all up, its a beautiful room but all around not worth the money!

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Casino, some issues though.
sample_comments.text: We enjoyed our stay. It wasn't too far from the strip which was nice and had better rates because of that. Unfortunately there's a strike going on there which we didn't know about so it's extremely loud arriving to the hotel. We also didn't have hot water for half the stay which was frustrating and nothing was offered as compensation for this. The restaurants were nice, except be warned if you have anyone under 21 you can't go to half of them. Rooms were a nice size and felt clean.

sample_comments.title: We can't recommend it
sample_comments.positives: Room illumination was good - a lot of options
sample_comments.negatives: 1. We had a door to another room right in front of the bed. I mean another room - other hotel's guests. A lot of noise and hard to sleep - you can hear every word of your neighbour. 2. The fridge was full of stuff, and you couldn't put your stuff there, so it was useless. 3. The size of the water bottles was a joke

sample_comments.title: Disgusting
sample_comments.text: Rather newer looking hotel. But they did not advertise that there would be some disturbance from protesting people outside their hotel, which has happened for a while apparently. Upon cancellation request, they won't refund my money hence I had to bear with it. Yes I couldn't hear it from the room, but can hear them in reception area, parking area and few other places. And hotel was pretty quiet due to that. Room is quite spacious and bright which was great. But when I got into the bathroom, there were rubbish from the previous guest in the shower as well as human debris in it. I am wondering if they have issues with staffing, as per the protestor. Not the best experience unfortunately. Will I come back?Honestly I don't mind if they improve the cleanliness and no more protesting.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The pools were really night, but one of them was closed. The pool bar was also nice. The rooms were overall modern designed and we were able to see some of the main strip from our window, which I also appreciated. Once we complained the first night, they did accommodate us by placing us in a different room.
sample_comments.negatives: The beds had sheets as comforters, not thick enough at all for comfort. Most of the ice machines didn't work, and the one that did was very dirty, all of them had expired service stickers on them. The location of our room from the actual entrance of the hotel/lobby was a very far walk. The front desk lines were always long and the staff was always short. After our flight was delayed to Vegas, we arrived late, which wasn't their fault, but our room was not cleaned very well when we arrived, it was a bad first impression. The "sand" at one of the pools was so hot, that it burned my feet after just trying to get to the pool water, which was less than a couple of feet away. On top of everything, the price of anything in the convenience store was absurdly expensive. A bottle water was more than $8; it was not very convenient when we had to take a trip to the CVS across the street for the basics, it was supposed to be a RELAXING VACATION. Will definitely be staying somewhere else next time we visit.

sample_comments.text: The price was double what was [initially] advertised. I asked and they all shied away from the questions. I was not going to ruin their Christmas as they did to my pocket/wallet. Scam! Stay away.

sample_comments.negatives: The parking is technically free, but it's a hassle --- a long walk and two elevators to get to the room. There were only three towels for four people, which seems ridiculous. The windows don't open, and the air conditioning blasts, with no way to avoid it except turning it off completely. The fridge was filled with unnecessary paid items, and if you want to use it for your own things, you'll be charged $40 --- a bizarre setup. The light switches are fancy, but they work poorly and make it hard to use them --- regular switches would have been much better. The walls are paper-thin, and I could hear neighbors talking and coughing during the night.

The hotel in general is kinda dead. There's no energy and crowds compared to other hotels on strip. 
The minibar had some stuff in it, so I couldn't use it to chill our champagne we brought. If you move any items in there - you get charged. If you want the minibar emptied - they can do that, but for a $40 charge. 
At the checkout the staff didn't even ask how was our stay.

sample_comments.title: Pretty Good Overall
sample_comments.text: The hotel is well situated, but off the strip. This means that you will need to ride share to most places on the strip, however it is not very expensive to do so (10-12 dollars per ride on average). The hotel rooms are nice and do not require a lot of cleaning. Do note that if you require extra towels or whatever, you will need to wait a while because the property is huge. Initially, it was difficult getting in contact with the front desk to change rooms due to the first one needing cleaning, however the new room was great and the phone worked perfectly. Like any Vegas hotel, they will nickel and dime you so make sure you are aware of any potential purchases you may be making by asking for the cost prior to ordering/requesting anything. Do also note that you should not take anything out of the fridge as it automatically charges you even if you do not consume the beverage, but it states that on a sticker on the fridge. Overall, solid hotel and I would give it a 4/5.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kai,
Thank you for choosing Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton. It sounds like you appreciated our location in the heart of Vegas, but away from the hustle and bustle. Although we apologize for the cleanliness concern, it was our pleasure to remedy this issue. We value you as our guest, and we hope you will stay with us again next time you're in town.

sample_comments.title: Mother's Day Trip
sample_comments.text: Nicely redone hotel with spacious rooms. Upgraded with small fee to a suite which was nice. Casino is somewhat sparse and quiet..not a ton of action. Kassi Beach restaurant was very good. Pool area was very nice however could not bring own water in, and only option was to pay for water at the bar or have it delivered to your chair. The delivery option included an additional fee and this caused a bottle of water to be close to $10 which is outrageous! I also overheard some very young children asking for cups of water at the bar and they were told they would have to pay. Not a great service to guests when spending a day in the sun at over 100 degrees outside. Most desert hotels at least offer self-serve water stations to keep guests hydrated at the pools. Other than this, overall our stay was pleasant and I would choose to stay again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Shellie,
Thank you for your recent visit with us. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed your accommodations and had a pleasant stay with us, but we're saddened to hear that the service in the pool area did not meet your expectations. We will use your constructive feedback as a way to continually improve upon the experience of our guests. Thanks again, and we wish you happy and safe travels.

sample_comments.title: Not for everyone
sample_comments.text:
I found the price to be pretty high for a "non strip" hotel. This was our first time (couple) in a off strip hotel and we were surprised (some good some bad). 
The good: 
-You get more for your buck. The rooms are basically suites. 
- The in house restaurants are surprisingly really good and "hip". 
- Nice staff. 
The bad:
- Price. Yes you do get more for your buck BUT rates are pretty much the same as a decent hotel on the stip. 
- Casino. Nothing special about it, pretty depressing to be honest. 
---
Summary: if you plan to be in the hotel for most of your trip and only have destinations scheduled (grabbing an uber to your scheduled events).. we recommend. 
If your plan is to walk all day touring around the strip... we don't recommend. You're better off in a Vdara, Planet Hollywood, and such (similar rates).

But generally the whole complex feels empty, not much to do, and quite far from any Las Vegas action. Barely a few tables to play. No real bar, except lobby. Very packed pool. Second pool with a beach club was closed for 4 out of 5 days we were here.

However, we regret that certain aspects did not meet your needs and have shared your feedback with our team as we continue to improve the guest experience. It was a pleasure having you here, and we hope to welcome you back soon for an even more enjoyable experience.

sample_comments.title: Review for Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton
sample_comments.text:
I recently stayed at Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, part of the Curio Collection by Hilton, and had a generally pleasant experience. The hotel features a modern and lively atmosphere with spacious and well-designed rooms. The amenities, including a serene pool area, fitness center, and various dining options, were enjoyable and added to the overall experience.

However, it's important to note that Hilton Gold benefits do not apply to this property, which might be a consideration for Hilton members. The hotel may not be the best choice for families, as it is not particularly kid-friendly. Additionally, noise from adjacent rooms was occasionally noticeable, which could be a concern for light sleepers.

The service was friendly, and the housekeeping staff were generally attentive. While the dining options were somewhat limited at night, the food quality during the day was satisfactory.

Overall, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas offers a vibrant and stylish stay with excellent amenities. Just keep in mind the noise levels and the applicability of Hilton Gold benefits. For those looking for a lively and modern experience away from the main strip, this hotel can be a good choice.
sample_comments.response: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're glad to hear you had such a pleasant stay with us at Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton, and could enjoy our friendly team, delicious food, and excellent, convenient amenities. That being said, we apologize for any confusion regarding the Hilton Honors program. Please know that while we do participate in this program, benefits cannot be applied to guests who book through third-party sites like Agoda, as we have little control over these reservations. Your feedback is essential in helping us grow as a destination, and we hope to welcome you back soon for another lovely stay.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Stay: A Review of Virgin Hotels Las Vegas
sample_comments.text:
I recently stayed at the Virgin Hotels Las Vegas and I have to say that I was thoroughly impressed with my experience. The hotel is conveniently located close to the strip, making it easy to get around and explore all that Las Vegas has to offer.

The rooms themselves were spacious, clean, and modern, with all the amenities you could possibly need. I particularly appreciated the attention to detail in the design, which gave the room a luxurious feel without being too over-the-top.

The casino at Virgin Hotels Las Vegas is also quite impressive, with a wide range of games and activities to choose from. Whether you're a seasoned gambler or just looking for a bit of fun, you're sure to find something to enjoy here.

But what really sets this hotel apart, in my opinion, is the staff. From the moment I arrived, I was made to feel welcome and valued as a guest. Every member of the team I interacted with was friendly, knowledgeable, and eager to help in any way they could.

The only downside to my stay was the fact that they charged for hot water if you wanted to make coffee in your room, which was a bit of a surprise. However, this was a minor issue overall and didn't detract from my overall positive impression of the hotel.

In conclusion, I would highly recommend Virgin Hotels Las Vegas to anyone looking for a comfortable, stylish, and convenient place to stay in Las Vegas. With its great location, top-notch amenities, and outstanding staff, it's a truly excellent choice for anyone visiting this vibrant city.

sample_comments.negatives: There was no coffee available in the room, which was very disappointing. There was no 24 hour room service either, which was surprising. Also, there were only two large towels and for a king room, I expected at least 4 large towels, since there were two people on the reservation & staying in the room. The bathroom set up was a little awkward, with the location of the door, and shower door. It was actually easier to leave the bathroom door open in order to easily open & close the shower door. The toilet took a long time to refill and flush more than once. The shower head, was really high & anyone shorter than 6 feet would not be able to switch it to the wand.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel but too focussed on money making
sample_comments.positives:
- Spacious modern room, and also a very spacious and nice bathroom
- Several restaurants with good food quality
- The staff was friendly and helpful
- Nice outside areas and pools
- Live music in the bar
- Some extra events can be booked. E.g. there was a rock band one night.
sample_comments.negatives:
- I had picked the hotel because I knew it would be really hot in Vegas and the pool area looked really nice. But it turned out that you could only stay there if you had a lounge chair and there were never enough. So we needed to book a cabana - $150 per day during the week and $300 on weekends. No option for booking per hour, and we did not want to stay so long.
- Cocktails at the pool were expensive, tasted of artificial flavors, and looked very food-colored.
- No free drinking water. Tap water tastes bad. A bottle of water is $8.
- No coffee machine in the room
- The music was very loud everywhere. When we sat in the restaurant, we heard very loud music from inside, very loud music from the pool, and very loud rock music from the event lawn at the same time.
- The air conditioning was set to very low temperatures in the restaurants and the casino. We always needed sweaters. Why would anybody want it extremely cold inside while it is extremely hot outside?
- If you touch anything in the fridge or from the snack tray, you are charged immediately. This is not really clear at first view.
- Also, I was curious about the "Romantic Kid" on the snack tray and read the "ingredients". Turned out it was two condoms and a towel. Guess the price - $69!!
- The light switches were weird - it took me forever to figure out how to get the right lights on in the bathroom.
All in all, the hotel is clearly not 'customer first', but 'make money first'. I would not use it again.

I've stayed at the Cosmopolitan, Tuscany Suites, and now Virgin Hotels on my trips to Las Vegas.

You can order things for the room through the TV interface and it arrives within a couple of minutes. The staff are kind and helpful, and I won money at their casino! 
We stayed in the Canyons Tower and had a nice spacious suite with a tub and shower. 
The decor and style are modern and refreshing. The view was nice. The dimmable lighting throughout the whole suite is neat! 
We will be coming back here next year <3
sample_comments.response:

We are very glad that our team made a kind impression, that you had some fun casino wins, and that your spacious suite, with its modern design, tub and shower, and dimmable lighting, felt so comfortable. We are delighted that you plan to return next year, and we look forward to welcoming you back!

secondary.description_full:
Khám Phá Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton - Nơi Hội Tụ Của Sang Trọng và Tiện Nghi Tại Las Vegas

Khách hàng cũng nhận xét tích cực về đội ngũ nhân viên của khách sạn, với điểm đánh giá lên tới 8.5. Nhân viên tận tâm và thân thiện, luôn sẵn sàng để hỗ trợ và đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. 

Với những đánh giá tích cực như vậy, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Las Vegas.

embedding_text:
Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, Curio Collection by Hilton - khách sạn 4.5 sao tại Las Vegas (NV).
Địa chỉ: 4455 Paradise Rd, Đông The Strip, Las Vegas (NV), Hoa Kỳ.
Ngoài tiêu chuẩn Hilton CleanStay, tất cả khách đều được truy cập Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng và đỗ xe miễn phí nếu đến bằng ô tô. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Đông The Strip của Las Vegas (NV), chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 4.5 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi ngoài trời, bồn tắm nước nóng và phòng tập ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bãi đỗ xe có nhân viên, Bình chữa cháy, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bữa sáng trong phòng, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Chuỗi khách sạn, Chỗ để xe cho ô tô - phương tiện tự đỗ xe, Các phương tiện dành cho khách khuyết tật, Câu lạc bộ đêm, Có cung cấp hóa đơn, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn, Cửa hàng tạp hóa, Cửa sổ, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ bán thức ăn sáng mang về, Dịch vụ báo thức, Dịch vụ giặt là, Dịch vụ khử trùng chuyên nghiệp, Dịch vụ phát trực tuyến như Netflix, Dịch vụ phòng, Dịch vụ thanh toán không sử dụng tiền mặt.
Điểm đánh giá 8.5/10 dựa trên 4477 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Độ sạch sẽ, Địa điểm, Dịch vụ, Kích thước phòng, Đáng tiền, Bể bơi, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Nhận phòng.
Các loại phòng: Room with views; Phòng Giường Lớn (King Chamber); Phòng Suite Ruby 2 Giường Đôi Lớn Grand Chamber (Ruby 2 Queens Grand Chamber Suite); Phòng 2 Giường Đôi Lớn (2 Queens Chamber); Phòng Suite Ruby 2 Giường Đôi Lớn Grand Chamber Cho Phép Mang Theo Chó (Ruby 2 Queens Dog Grand Chamber Suite); Phòng Suite Loại Sang Giường Lớn Grand Canyon (Canyon King Deluxe Grand Chamber Suite); Phòng Suite Oasis Giường Lớn Canyon (Canyon King Oasis Chamber Suite); Phòng Suite Ruby King Dog (Ruby King Dog Chamber Suite).
Gần: The Joint, Valet Parking, Club Paradise, Paradise self park, Free Parking, Myron Partridge Track Stadium.
